description: Product/clinical policy that maps a triage result (condition + confidence band + result state) to an urgency class. Urgency is a POLICY layer, not a model output, and MUST NOT be derived from raw confidence alone. Evaluated top-to-bottom: the first matching rule wins.

rules.rationale: Image outside training distribution; do not assign clinical urgency.
Model completed but is uncertain; ask for a better photo or a vet consult, never present as actionable.

rules.escalateWhen: symptomNotes indicate spreading, pain, open lesions, or fever (manual review queue)
rules.rationale: Bacterial pyoderma and similar can be serious.
Zoonotic / fungal conditions merit a scheduled consult.
Allergic/atopic dermatitis: monitor and track changes.
Conservative default: never return no_urgency for a medical-adjacent result without an explicit low-severity + confident match.

uiUrgencyMap._comment: Reference only. PetCare-Web maps canonical urgency -> its Urgency token (src/lib/mock-data.ts). Canonical urgency is authoritative and persisted; UI tokens are presentational.
